name: MyTinyAI
tagline: PocketAI Pro - On-device AI with multi-backend support (fllama + Gemma 4 LiteRT-LM)
features: 17 LLM models: Qwen, Llama, Gemma, DeepSeek, Phi, SmolLM, Granite, TinyLlama, MiniCPM-V (0.5B–4.1B params)
2 vision models: MobileVLM V2 1.7B (light) and MobileVLM 3B (best quality): describe photos, read text in images, answer visual questions...
Optimised vision pipeline: Higher-quality image capture (768x768@90%), low temperature (0.3), boosted max tokens (1024) for detailed imag...
Hey Tiny voice mode: Continuous hands-free conversation: STT → inference → TTS → auto-listen loop with animated "Thinking" indicator
blog_notes: PocketAI variant — likely public/pro release of the same flagship.
